title: KRA Exceeds FY2024 Revenue Target
message: Kenya Revenue Authority has collected KES 2.52 trillion in FY2024, exceeding the target of KES 2.49 trillion. Customs and VAT collections were the strongest performers.

title: Kenya Airways Debt Restructuring — Lenders Agreement Progressing
message: Kenya Airways reports that 8 of 12 lenders in the KQ Lenders Group have agreed in principle to the debt restructuring terms. Remaining 4 lenders expected to conclude by 30 April 2025.

title: KPA Record Container Throughput — FY2024
message: Kenya Ports Authority reports record container throughput of 1.72 million TEUs at the Port of Mombasa in FY2024, up 8% from FY2023. Vessel turnaround time improved to 3.8 days.

title: Kenya Power System Losses Reduced to 21.5%
message: Kenya Power reports system losses have been reduced to 21.5% as at Q3 FY2024, down from 23% at the start of the year. Smart metering rollout contributing to commercial loss reduction.

title: NSSF Act 2023 — Court of Appeal Ruling Awaited
message: The Court of Appeal is expected to deliver its ruling on the NSSF Act 2023 implementation by 30 April 2025. NSSF is operating under a court-supervised implementation framework pending the ruling.

title: KDB MSME Lending Reaches KES 11.2 Billion
message: Kenya Development Bank reports MSME lending portfolio has reached KES 11.2 billion, representing 35% of total loan book. 1,850 MSMEs supported in FY2024 creating an estimated 12,000 jobs.
